prompt: A collage style of reference image with a brighter color style.
prompt_refined: Generate an image in a vibrant and brightly colored collage style, replicating the composition and elements of image 1. Maintain the central monochromatic portrait of the older woman, surrounded by a lively arrangement of other elements. Include the stack of old photographs with the child's boat drawing in the top-left, the smiling young girl and postage stamp on the right, the wooden rocking horse toy and handwritten paper scraps in the bottom-left, the vintage alarm clock at the bottom, and the colorful spinning top toy on the bottom-right. Incorporate the teal watercolor leaves and torn paper elements, preserving the overall layered, vertical, and somewhat circular structure from image 1. Transform the muted and desaturated tones of image 1 into a distinctly brighter and more colorful palette for all non-monochromatic components and the background.
objects: Central monochromatic portrait of the older woman
Stack of old photographs with a child's boat drawing in the top-left
Smiling young girl on the right
Wooden rocking horse toy in the bottom-left
Handwritten paper scraps in the bottom-left
Vintage alarm clock at the bottom
Colorful spinning top toy on the bottom-right
